faq.title: Questions?
faq.q1: Do I need a credit card to start?
faq.a1: No! The Compass plan is 100% free forever, no card required.
faq.q2: Can I cancel my subscription at any time?
faq.a2: Yes! Cancel whenever you want in settings. You keep access until the end of the paid period.
faq.a3: Clients in operational stages (Production, Traffic, Retention, Loyalty). Prospects in the sales funnel are unlimited in all plans!
faq.a4: Yes! End-to-end encryption, secure servers, we never share data with third parties.
